title: Safety & Compliance Executive
description:
Company’s Profile

Julian Grey’s client is a well-established chemical engineering MNC focused on offering sustainable and differentiated products in the chemical industry. The company is headquartered in Japan and established globally with 2 manufacturing plants in Singapore.

Job Responsibilities

  • Support the management of EHS administrative processes to ensure compliance with WSH regulations and applicable legal requirements
  • Maintain and support EHS management systems in line with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards, including participation in internal and external audits and follow-up on corrective actions
  • Coordinate and liaise with regulatory authorities, external auditors, and relevant agencies on EHS-related matters
  • Prepare and manage documentation related to approvals, permits, license applications/renewals, and internal EHS records
  • Assist in overseeing contractor and subcontractor safety, including permit-to-work and site safety controls
  • Support the planning and conduct of safety briefings, EHS training sessions, and emergency response drills
  • Assist with departmental activities related to facility and maintenance operations
  • Perform any other duties related to EHS and operational support as assigned

Requirements

  • Possess a Diploma in Engineering, Environmental Science, or related fields
  • Knowledge of EHS regulations and management systems, particularly ISO 14001 and ISO 45001
  • Certification such as WSH Coordinator or Advanced Certificate in Workplace Safety and Health will be an added advantage
  • Familiarity with Risk Assessment methodologies
  • Willingness to support activities outside standard office hours when required

postedCompany.description:
Julian Grey Corporate Advisory works with our corporate clients and candidates to facilitate a career matching in Singapore.
 
Started as a trading company in 2012, Julian Grey is a diversified business group with focus on Asia Pacific, Japan and Korea. Its business comprises of investments, corporate finance, trading, executive search, advisory and consulting for corporate and private clients.
 
The business group spans across different business units that cater to different segments of our clients.
 
Our recruitment business is to work with our global corporate clients with a consultative candidate sourcing strategy to helping an individual find their dream role.

EA Reg No. 19C9568
